trk_ingest_temporal_audit.interpretation: Sibling PDS3 label interval vs Earth-flyby perigee window. OCRU outer-cruise TNFs typically return false; do not treat their pairwise ramp proxy as perigee Doppler.

expected_data_products.description: Archival Tracking Data File - Raw Doppler

expected_data_products.note: May contain pre-processed data - use TRK-2-25 for raw Doppler proxy

trk_ingest_temporal_audit.interpretation: Sibling PDS3 label interval vs Earth-flyby perigee window. OCRU outer-cruise TNFs typically return false; do not treat their pairwise ramp proxy as perigee Doppler.

download.note: TRK-2-34 parser and Hz pairwise proxy may run; do not treat as perigee Doppler OD.

tier_II_uncertainty_aware_null.step039_juno: deterministic fixed-amplitude warning at pooled β; uncertainty-aware raw layer: true_null when random-effects scatter propagated

tier_III_perigee_trk_minimal_od_mm_s.detail: Ingested PDS3 label intervals miss the 2013 Earth-flyby window (e.g. OCRU outer-cruise 2015 TNF); ramp-frequency Hz proxy only.

evidence_tier_assessment.horizons_public_ephemeris_stress_test: Public Horizons geocentric deldot batch fit (pure Kepler, ±3 h): post-fit RMS ≈ 0.15 m/s — ephemeris consistency check only, not TRK Doppler or empirical-acceleration OD.
evidence_tier_assessment.od_absorption_not_required_for_juno_null: Step 039 classifies Juno as uncertainty-aware compatible with zero at random-effects amplitude scatter; OD-absorption is an unvalidated conjecture (Step 021 withholds F_OD; Step 012 synthetic quarantined).

doppler_residual_proxy_analysis.analysis_method_note: Sequential per-station difference of archival ramp_freq_hz (Hz); not Doppler, not mm/s, not OD residuals; not gated against 0.08 mm/s.

intended_minimal_od_when_bound.software_class: MONTE / JPL ODP-class batch least squares

falsification_test.reason: Ramp-frequency Hz pairwise proxy is defined, but no residuals fall in the ±2 h UTC window around 2013-10-09 19:21 (Earth flyby), or Hz summary is missing. Ingested arc may be outside perigee (e.g. OCRU outer cruise) — see DOWNLOAD_INSTRUCTIONS.txt.
falsification_test.recommendation: Overlap perigee UTC with the archive, or use Doppler-populated Earth-flyby TRK products for the mm/s gate.

matched_filter_tep_template.reason: Fewer than 5 residuals inside ±30 min perigee window

archive_presmoothing_sensitivity.interpretation: Uniform presmoothing of the archival observable before pairwise differencing. Large |fractional_change_in_mean_abs_vs_W1| under W≈31–61 suggests the proxy is sensitive to averaging comparable to multi-second–minute counting; that supports observable-level plausibility of pipeline attenuation but does not substitute for MONTE-class OD with empirical states.

batch_least_squares.residual_definition: RMS of (pure-Kepler geocentric deldot model − Horizons velocity_m_s); prefit/post_fit_rms_m_s duplicate prefit/post_fit_rms_rdot_residual_m_s for legacy readers.

velocity_only.interpretation: Match Horizons geocentric ``deldot`` only. Weakest public-data path; included for comparison with the range+velocity joint fit.

range_and_velocity.interpretation: Joint fit to Horizons geocentric ``range_m`` and ``velocity_m_s`` under pure Kepler. Uses all public ephemeris columns in the Step 004 JSON; still not TRK Doppler or empirical-acceleration OD.

horizons_minimal_od_batch.interpretation: Legacy key: velocity-only subset of horizons_public_ephemeris_batch (see velocity_only + range_and_velocity there).

batch_least_squares.residual_definition: RMS of (pure-Kepler geocentric deldot model − Horizons velocity_m_s); prefit/post_fit_rms_m_s duplicate prefit/post_fit_rms_rdot_residual_m_s for legacy readers.
